{{CargoRelic
|name=Franklin's Kite
|rank=Blue
|affct=FAME
|birthday=01-29
|source=Lottery (0.07%), Wishing (3.1%), Murikan Treasure Map (20%), Novice Scrolls (1%)
|description=On Jan 29, 1752, Franklin did a very dangerous experiment with a kite. As thunder clapped the winter skies, Franklin clapped the winter skies. Franklin and his son were calmly flying a kite. The lightning hit the kite that was flying at a high altitude, causing the electrical charges to pass through the copper wire and stored in the Leyden jar. This proved that lightning and charging by friction were the same. In the same year, Richmann and Lomonosov recreated the same experiment but were unfortunately killed by lightning strikes.

[Lightning at that time]

Intensity: Extremely strong<br>Length: 1000m<br>Temperature: 17,000 K<br>Electric field strength: 10,000 volts/cm
|fame=48
|art=23
|fth=28
|civ=28
|tech=27
|ss1=Time Machine upgrade B-tad Cost -1%
|ss2=Time Machine upgrade B-tad Cost -2%
|ss3=Time Machine upgrade B-tad Cost -3%
|ss4=Time Machine upgrade B-tad Cost -5%
|ss7=Time Machine upgrade B-tad Cost -5%<br>Time Machine upgrade B-tad Cost -5% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Murika skill I.png|50px]]Place in Murikan Museum: In Murika, Snail RUSH +20
}}

[[Category:Relics]]
[[Category:Blue Relics]]
[[Category:FAME Relics]]
[[Category:Blue FAME Relics]]
[[Category:Time Machine Upgrade Cost Reduction]]
[[Category:Murika Museum Boost]]
[[Category:Murika Exploration Boost]]
[[Category:RUSH Boost]]
[[Category:Demon Minion ATK Boost]]
[[Category:Zombie Minion ATK Boost]]
